creator: cvelbar@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #8)
I don't know how to provide a panic on a system that blanks the monitor, is not accessible through the network and records nothing in /var/crash :-/

I have now tried setting debug.debugger_on_panic=0
and in /boot/loader.conf dev.drm.skip_ddb="1"

Here is a dmesg from a *working* system. I'm using wayland so there is no xorg logs.
